product_direction: Photo-first static concept overlays; real AI rendering remains disabled.

coverage: Original, VerdeAI Concept, and Selected Future modes
five mapped overlay zones including first-move marker 5

limitations: The Chromium workflow used an inline document harness because normal localhost navigation is blocked in the test environment.
No physical Android-phone, live-deployment, Firefox, Safari, or WebKit validation is claimed.
Overlay placement uses scenario-aware responsive presets rather than computer vision or photorealistic image generation.
Real-property calibration is still required after deployment across varied photo angles, lighting, and aspect ratios.
